title: Aureline effective-setting record
description: Boundary schema for the effective-setting record every Aureline surface reads when quoting or rendering a setting. See docs/adr/0008-settings-definition-and-effective-configuration-resolver.md. One record shape flows between the resolver and every consumer (UI, JSONC files, CLI, command palette, docs, policy explainer, AI 'Explain why' affordance, profile import / export, optional sync, schema registry, mutation journal, support-bundle exporter). The record carries the winning value, the resolved scope, the shadow chain (every contributing scope in precedence order), the lock / constraint state, the typed write intent and denial reason, the restart posture, the preview class, the capability dependencies copied from the definition row, the control-stack block, and the audit provenance. Raw secret material never appears; credential_alias values carry aliases only (ADR-0007). The eventual settings crate's Rust types are the schema of record; this file is the cross-tool boundary. Adding a new top-level field, a new audit event id, or an additional enum value is additive-minor and bumps settings_schema_version; repurposing an existing field is breaking and requires a new decision row.

settings_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for this effective-setting vocabulary export. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the concrete payload shape. Every record carries exactly one kind.

setting_id.description: Canonical stable dotted lower-snake setting id. Must match a setting-definition row after alias redirection.

lock_reason.description: Typed reason the current lock_state was set. 'none' pairs with lock_state=unlocked.

write_intent.description: Frozen write-intent vocabulary. Gates preview / apply UX.

write_denial_reason.description: Frozen denial-reason vocabulary. 'none' pairs with write_intent != denied and surfaces 'no denial'.

actor_class.description: Frozen actor class for the most recent write that produced this value.

redaction_class.description: ADR-0007 redaction class copied from the definition row.

control_authority.description: Frozen control-authority class. Names which external control is currently influencing the setting.

offline_fallback.description: Local-offline fallback posture reserved for the control-stack surfaces.

audit_event_id.description: Frozen settings audit-event id set. Carried on the 'settings' audit stream.

value_present.description: Whether a value existed in this scope at resolution time.

value_preview.description: Preview of the scope's value (redacted per the setting's declared redaction_class). Never raw secret material. Absent when value_present is false.

source_label.description: Human-readable source tag for this scope.

winner.description: True for exactly one entry unless the resolver returned a degraded default; false otherwise.

shadow_chain_entry.description: One entry in the shadow chain, in precedence order.

satisfied.description: True when the dependency is currently satisfied; false locks the setting.

observed_state.description: Diagnostic label for the dependency's current state (for example, 'flag=off', 'trust=restricted', 'policy_epoch=14'). Redacted per ADR-0007.

capability_dependency_state.description: Capability-dependency state copied into the effective-setting record when the setting is gated.

source_label.description: Short source tag for the winning layer.

last_refresh_at.description: Monotonic stamp of the last time the control stack evaluated this setting.

expires_at.description: When the current control-stack binding expires; null if not bounded.

offline_fallback.description: Local-offline fallback posture for this setting at the moment of evaluation.

explain_why_ref.description: Opaque handle the 'Explain why' affordance resolves against the resolver.

narrowing_ceiling_active.description: True when admin-policy narrowing is capping the effective value.

control_stack_block.description: Frozen control-stack block. Reserves source label, lifecycle label, last-refresh stamp, expiry, local-offline fallback, explain-why affordance, control authority, and narrowing-ceiling state so the feature-flag, experiment, schema-governance, and admin-policy surfaces share one decision trace.

at.description: Monotonic stamp of the most recent write that produced this value.

mutation_journal_ref.description: Opaque handle into the ADR-0006 mutation journal for the write that produced this value.

rollback_checkpoint_ref.description: Opaque handle into the ADR-0006 mutation journal for the rollback checkpoint created before this write, when the setting's preview_class requires one.

last_written_block.description: Provenance for the most recent write.

value.description: Current effective value, typed per the definition row. credential_alias values carry aliases only (never raw secret bytes). Null is permitted only when the definition row declares a nullable value type.

source_label.description: Human-readable source tag for the winning scope.

shadow_chain.description: Ordered list of contributing scopes, in precedence order. Exactly one entry has winner=true unless the resolver returned a degraded default.

capability_dependencies.description: Capability dependencies copied from the definition row with their observed state.

schema_version.description: The setting-definition schema version the record conforms to (copied from the registry). Distinct from settings_schema_version, which versions this envelope.

alias_redirected_from.description: Legacy setting_id the caller asked for when a redirect fired; null if the caller asked for the canonical id directly.

migration_applied.description: from_version of the migration row applied on read; null if the stored value already matched the current shape.

preview_state.description: Current preview-flow state for preview_required and higher preview classes.

remote_scope_context.description: Present when the setting resolved inside a remote-agent workspace; names the remote session and the remote-side source label.

effective_setting_record.description: One effective-setting record. The only truth that flows between the resolver and any consumer surface.

resolved_scope.description: Scope that won at event time; null when no resolution occurred (for example, registry-only events).

workspace_scope_ref.description: Stable workspace scope id (ADR-0005) for events bound to a workspace.

note.description: Short human-readable note. Redacted per ADR-0007; never carries raw secret material.

settings_audit_event_record.description: One structured audit event on the 'settings' stream. Raw secret material is forbidden.
